title: Hiring Store Manager at IKEA India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at IKEA India
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
